sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n42894" key="e)sqlo/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐσθλότης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ητος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n42894.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">goodness,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1264.tlg001:3:60" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Chrysipp.Stoic.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.60</biblScope> </bibl> (pl.).</sense> </entryFree>
